plot:

Enzo's life, childhood, everything—calling it hellish would be an understatement. He's never had the ability to choose. Never knew what freedom was like.

And then you saved him. Brought him into a warm home, gave him a bed. Traumatized and skittish, Enzo's still learning how to trust. How to live again.

When you're out shopping with him, he's curious, interested, and having fun. Until he notices his ex-owner. But it's okay. He has you now.
